Simon Holm

Education

2024 –
BSc Artificial Intelligence University of Southern Denmark (IMADA), Odense

Algorithms & data structures, machine learning, linear algebra, functional programming (Haskell), knowledge representation, optimisation, ethics.

2020 – 2023
Gymnasium (STX) Technical programme

Mathematics, physics, innovation & product development.

Experience

Mar 2025 -
Chairperson, IMADA Fagråd University of Southern Denmark

Student council for AI & Mathematics. Represent students in faculty and university meetings.

2025 -
Student Helper Institute of Mathematics and Computer Science, University of Southern Denmark

Teaching workshops on machine learning and algorithmic problem solving to gymnasium students.

2026 -
Webscraper & Web Developer Institute of Economic History

Collected and structured data from public sources using web scraping, and developed dashboards to visualize results as part of an SDU research project.

Skills

Python · Java · Haskell · SQL · PyTorch · SciPy · Git
